arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Attacking Crisis: Gasperini’s Limited Options from Lookman to Maldini and Scamacca
arts.sum: Atalanta's dream of challenging for the Scudetto has been hampered by an injury crisis that has decimated their once-deep squad. What began as a defensive issue has now spread to the attack, leaving manager Gian Piero Gasperini with limited options in a crucial phase of the season. The post Atalanta’s Attacking Crisis: Gasperini’s Limited Options from Lookman to Maldini and Scamacca appeared first on FootItalia.com.
